name_en: 【Bvlgari】Mini Chain Bag is here 🥰 Bvlgari boutique new Serpenti Diamond Blast Chain Bag, available first 💗💗 Made of pink calfskin with three chain decorations. The classic snake head clasp features bright pink enamel and heart-shaped decoration with black onyx eyes. Ingenious 'Serpenti in Love' design.
